headline: BMO Capital Maintains Outperform on TransDigm Group, Raises Price Target to $1525
summary: BMO Capital  analyst Michael Goldie   maintains TransDigm Group (NYSE:TDG) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $1450 to $1525.
